---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## User Story

**As a** [student/teacher/admin],
**I want** [goal/desire],
**So that** [benefit/value].

## Requirements

### Functional Requirements
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

### Non-Functional Requirements
- [ ] Performance target (if applicable)
- [ ] Security considerations (if applicable)
- [ ] Accessibility requirements (if applicable)

## Design Notes

**UI/UX Considerations:**
- (Describe expected user flow)
- (Are new screens/components needed?)
- (Reference existing design patterns)

**Design Status:**
- [ ] Design needed (Bailey to create)
- [ ] Design ready (linked below)
- [ ] Use existing design patterns

**Design Link:**
(Pencil file, Figma link, or screenshot)

## Architecture Impact

### Backend Changes
- [ ] New Cloud Functions
- [ ] Firestore schema changes
- [ ] Security rule updates
- [ ] Third-party integrations

### Mobile App Changes
- [ ] New screens
- [ ] New services/providers
- [ ] New dependencies
- [ ] Platform-specific code (iOS/Android)

### Web Dashboard Changes
- [ ] New pages/components
- [ ] API changes
- [ ] New dependencies

### Files to Modify/Create
- `file1.dart`
- `file2.ts`
- `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`

## Estimated Effort

**Design:** X hours (Bailey)
**Backend:** X hours
**Mobile:** X hours (Huy)
**Web:** X hours
**Testing:** X hours
**Total:** X hours

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] User can [action 1]
- [ ] System does [behavior 1]
- [ ] Edge case [X] is handled
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Dependencies

**Blocks:**
- Issue #X must be completed first

**Blocked by:**
- Waiting on design approval
- Waiting on third-party API access

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (needed for MVP)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have for MVP)
- [ ] Low (post-MVP)

## Additional Context

(Competitive analysis, user feedback, screenshots, etc.)
